scoringPlays.text: Adam Randall 1 Yd Run (Nolan Hauser Kick)
Caden Durham 2 Yd Run (Damian Ramos Kick)

videos.headline: Clemson's Avieon Terrell forces a fumble on Bauer Sharp
videos.description: Avieon Terrell hits Bauer Sharp as he's falling and Ricardo Jones picks it up for Clemson.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Clemson's Avieon Terrell forces a fumble on Bauer Sharp) 2025/08/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Clemson's Adam Randall powers his way in for a TD on 4th-and-goal
videos.description: Adam Randall initially gets stopped at the goal line but continues to push his way into the end zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Clemson's Adam Randall powers his way in for a TD on 4th-and-goal) 2025/08/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Nolan Hauser gets Clemson on the board with a FG
videos.description: Nolan Hauser makes a 42-yard field foal to give Clemson a 3-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Nolan Hauser gets Clemson on the board with a FG) 2025/08/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: LSU's Damian Ramos drills a 52-yard FG
videos.description: Damian Ramos ties the score 3-3 with a 52-yard field goal.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LSU's Damian Ramos drills a 52-yard FG) 2025/08/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: LSU's Chris Hilton Jr. fumbles on 4th down right before the half
videos.description: Garrett Nussmeier passes it out to Chris Hilton Jr., who fumbles the ball in the red zone for LSU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LSU's Chris Hilton Jr. fumbles on 4th down right before the half) 2025/08/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Caden Durham pulls LSU level with a rushing TD
videos.description: Caden Durham rumbles into the end zone for LSU's first touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Caden Durham pulls LSU level with a rushing TD) 2025/08/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cade Klubnik throws an INT
videos.description: Cade Klubnik overthrows his receiver and Mansoor Delane picks him off.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cade Klubnik throws an INT) 2025/08/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Garrett Nussmeier's big completion gets overturned
videos.description: Garrett Nussmeier makes an amazing throw to Barion Brown, but after a review the referees say it's an incomplete pass.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Garrett Nussmeier's big completion gets overturned) 2025/08/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Garrett Nussmeier connects with Trey'Dez Green for an LSU TD
videos.description: Garrett Nussmeier hits Trey'Dez Green for a touchdown to give LSU a 17-10 lead over Clemson.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Garrett Nussmeier connects with Trey'Dez Green for an LSU TD) 2025/08/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: LSU stops Cade Klubnik on 4th down to seal win vs. Clemson
videos.description: Cade Klubnik throws it to no one on fourth down which seals LSU's win over Clemson.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LSU stops Cade Klubnik on 4th down to seal win vs. Clemson) 2025/08/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Brian Kelly elaborates on LSU's statement in win vs. Clemson
videos.description: Kelly reflects on LSU's momentum and resilience against the opposing Tigers and discusses what makes Garrett Nussmeier such a great leader in the pocket.

videos.headline: Garrett Nussmeier raves about LSU defense after winning Tiger Bowl
videos.description: LSU QB Nussmeier discusses the impact of his offseason preparation after the monumental season-opening win at Clemson, crediting the defense the most for the 17-10 win.
